name: maps a group conflict row to a GROUP_OVERLAP Conflict
fullName: iter-scheduling-api:src/services/GraphService.test.ts#GraphService queryConflicts() maps a group conflict row to a GROUP_OVERLAP Conflict

steps.name: expect([{"id":"GROUP_OVERLAP_CLS_002_CLS_003","type":"GROUP_OVERLAP","classIds":"[Array]","message":"Student group 'Bio Year 1' is scheduled in two classes simultaneou... <truncated>).toHaveLength(1)

expect({"id":"GROUP_OVERLAP_CLS_002_CLS_003","type":"GROUP_OVERLAP","classIds":["CLS_002","CLS_003"],"message":"Student group 'Bio Year 1' is scheduled in two classes ... <truncated>).toMatchObject({"id":"GROUP_OVERLAP_CLS_002_CLS_003","type":"GROUP_OVERLAP","classIds":["CLS_002","CLS_003"]})
expect("Student group 'Bio Year 1' is scheduled in two classes simultaneously: CLS_002 and CLS_003").toContain("Bio Year 1")
